title: New drug targets from RNA-binding proteins
author: Turunen, Ari
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Piia Bartos, a senior pharmaceutical researcher at the University of Eastern Finland’s School of Pharmacy, is interested in RNA, the proteins that bind RNA, and how this system can be influenced to prevent cancer growth. She studies RNA and the function of the argonaute protein that binds to it using massive simulations.
